## How to test

- [ ] `bundle exec rspec`
- [ ] `bundle exec rubocop`

## Checklist

- [ ] User-visible or behavior change is noted in `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`, or this change is internal/docs-only
- [ ] Default production / opt-in story matches the README (e.g. no new hot path unless the user enables it)
- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and the Code of Conduct
